/cwe/weakness/1100.Name: Insufficient Isolation of System-Dependent Functions
/cwe/weakness/1100.Description:
The product or code does not isolate system-dependent
					functionality into separate standalone modules.
/cwe/weakness/1100.ExtendedDescription: This issue makes it more difficult to maintain and/or port the product, which indirectly affects security by making it more difficult or time-consuming to find and/or fix vulnerabilities. It also might make it easier to introduce vulnerabilities.
